summary: Frontend E2E for Produce-Dialog auto-request of short raw materials (iter192). Full happy path PASSES. The shortfall summary, amber auto-request button, request creation, badge increment, and dialog persistence all work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: WarehouseManufacturing.js is now 7718 lines — very large; consider splitting into sub-components (Produce dialog, Mfg-requests tab, etc.) for maintainability.

Console shows transient 403s on /api/branches right after login during splash-screen fade (same observation as iter191). Token may fire before auth context is ready. Low priority but worth gating fetches behind auth-ready state.

Note: with the default produce quantity (1 piece), دجاج زنجر تست does NOT trigger shortage (needs 0.1869 كغم vs 9 كغم available). Shortage only appears when qty >= ~49. The problem statement said 'producing default quantity makes the material short' — this only holds for very small inventory or larger default qty. The button correctly only shows when at least one material is actually short, which is the desired behavior.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed: دجاج زنجر تست (qty 0, piece 191g, recipe 0.1869kg صدر دجاج), manufacturing_inventory صدر دجاج تست = 9 كغم. Tested with produce qty=100 to force shortage of 10.1 كغم.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public frontend URL is https://trusted-device-auth.preview.emergentagent.com (NOT maestro-egp.* which returns Preview Unavailable). Login first then navigate to /warehouse-manufacturing. The التصنيع tab is data-testid='tab-manufacturing' (not 'tab-mfg-requests'). To trigger shortage on دجاج زنجر تست, set [data-testid='produce-quantity-input'] to a value >= ~49 (e.g., 100). The auto-request button only renders when shortItems.length > 0. Sonner toasts auto-dismiss in ~4s — capture quickly or assert side-effects (badge increment, new request in طلبات التصنيع tab).

test_evidence.produce_dialog_open: [data-testid='produce-dialog'] shown with title 'تصنيع: دجاج زنجر تست', recipe row صدر دجاج تست with red ناقص badge, مطلوب 19.1 كغم, متوفر 9 كغم.
test_evidence.shortfall_summary: [data-testid='produce-shortfall-summary'] visible: '⚠️ 1 مادة ناقصة — اطلب تحويلها من المخزن قبل التصنيع'.
test_evidence.auto_request_button: [data-testid='auto-request-short-materials-btn'] visible, amber bg-amber-500, label exactly 'اطلب المواد الناقصة من المخزن تلقائياً'.
test_evidence.click_outcome: Pending badge on [data-testid='tab-mfg-requests'] went 1 -> 2. New request #2 created with item 'صدر دجاج تست' qty 10.1 كغم, cost 50,500 IQD, status بانتظار التنفيذ, notes='طلب تلقائي للمواد الناقصة لتصنيع 100 قطعة من دجاج زنجر تست'. Shortfall math correct: 19.1 - 9 = 10.1 كغم.
test_evidence.dialog_persistence: Dialog remained open after the auto-request click (per requirement 'WITHOUT leaving the produce dialog').
test_evidence.toast_text: Could not capture via querySelector('[data-sonner-toast]') in test — likely auto-dismissed within the 5s wait window. The toast IS implemented in code (handleAutoRequestShortMaterials lines 1925-1928) and the underlying API call succeeded (verified via badge + new request).

rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Feature implemented and working end-to-end as specified.
